title: Just Another Witchery Remake
description: An old mod in new light, everything remade and re-imagined. Hopefully it will re-spark the old cauldron
body:
### **Update 0.4+ will only be for neoforge forever**

Mods too large for me to do multiloader.

### **Update 0.3.0 probably breaks stuff from 0.2.0, so make backups**

Modfest 2024 / SpookyJam 2024

This project started as a fun challenge to create a large content mod under a tight time window. This Witchery Remake aims to add everything from the old Witchery mod but in a new light and a refreshing take on the textures and content. This is not a 1:1 replica of Witchery but rather a 1:0.9 remake, most things will be familiar. Even as this is an event created mod it will be completed after the event has ended as all of the creators of this mod look forward to a full remake.

We also wanted to make this as datapack-friendly as possible with data driven rituals and recipes, with command excecution support and modpack-centric design choices.

At this current moment the mod barely have and "content" available for the average player and is very prone to bugs as this was made in the span of a month.

![Witchery](https://i.imgur.com/viiNs5G.png)
